# EXODIA5

> Cinematic gaming platform and central hub for EXODIA5 Gaming IPs, featuring an interactive Earth simulation and command terminal.

EXODIA5 is the public portal for EXODIA Holdings' gaming ecosystem. The landing page presents an interactive globe; the authenticated workspace runs the EXODIA reality engine — a governed terminal for spawning semantic world objects.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Interactive Earth landing page and ecosystem overview.
